subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto those who have believed in God, the One, the Chosen, that the utterance may draw them nigh unto the Dawning-Place [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی اللائی آمن بالله الواحد المختار لیقربهن البیان الی مطلع
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @importance of prayer, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
